summary: Phase 2 Sentinel (structured world model) fully tested. Backend: 7/7 pytest cases pass — /api/sentinel/status (connected/gps/4G/42/GST Road Northbound/N/4), /api/sentinel/hazards (hz-001 lat/lon, distanceMeters=180, confidence=91, sources=2, risk=high, routeRelevance=high, visibilityState=hidden, sourceType=shared_vehicle, recommendedAction='Reduce speed'), /api/sentinel/nearby-vehicles (4 entries with location.lat/lon + heading_degrees), /api/sentinel/world-model (scenarioId='gst-northbound-blind-turn-v1', telemetrySource='demo', ego.location, mapBounds.southWest/northEast, roads=3, buildings=8, occupiedRegions=4 incl. objectType='unknown', nearbyVehicles=4, hazards=2), POST confirm + report-incorrect increments + camelCase reportedIncorrect, 404 on unknown hazard, no _id leak. Frontend (mobile 375x667): Drive HUD shows SENTINEL/42/GST Road Northbound and ENGAGE GHOST VISION CTA navigates. Ghost Vision: top-status-strip with sentinel/gps/network chips + speed 42, mode-badge='DEMO', world-map SVG renders inside ghost-vision-map, telemetry-source-badge='DEMO SCENARIO · SIMULATED TELEMETRY', map-attribution shows OpenStreetMap, map-legend has You/Sentinel/Obstruction/Ghost hazard/Unknown, active-hazard-distance shows '≈180' and 'm'. HazardBottomSheet shows 'Stationary Vehicle Ahead', 'HIGH RISK', 'HIDDEN · Beyond line of sight', 180/91/2 metrics, 'REDUCE SPEED'. Tapping hazard-card-toggle expands to show 'Northbound lane', 'Shared by Sentinel network', 'Route relevance · HIGH'. Tapping engage-live-geo-button on web preview does NOT crash; renders map-error-state with Retry/Use Demo. bottom-action-row has 4 buttons. confirm-hazard-button POSTs and shows 'Hazard confirmed' flash; report-incorrect-button POSTs and shows 'Report submitted' flash; mute-voice-button toggles 'Voice' ↔ 'Muted'; return-to-drive-button navigates back to '/'. Every spec item passed.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/ghost-vision.tsx:211 — replace pointerEvents="none" prop with style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }} for RN 0.74+/Expo 54 compliance. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional / cosmetic) Move pointerEvents="none" from prop to style on the distance pill View in /app/frontend/app/ghost-vision.tsx:211 to silence the deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean lifespan handler; all Mongo reads project out _id; new geo schema and seed are idempotent via ensure_seed().
WorldModel response uses a plain dict for /world-model; OK for now but consider returning the typed WorldModel pydantic model so FastAPI validates the contract on every response.
ghost-vision.tsx is ~660 lines and starts to combine UI, geo state, TTS, and actions; can be split further if it grows (HazardBottomSheet/MapLegend/WorldMap already modular).
seed_data_creation: MongoDB hazards & nearby_vehicles re-seeded by ensure_seed() on first API call (already populated with the new geo schema).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_sentinel.py -v. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Ghost Vision testIDs are stable: ghost-vision-screen, top-status-strip, sentinel/gps/network-status-chip, top-speed, mode-badge, ghost-vision-map, world-map, telemetry-source-badge, map-attribution, map-legend, active-hazard-distance, hazard-info-card, hazard-card-toggle, recommended-action, bottom-action-row, return-to-drive/confirm-hazard/report-incorrect/mute-voice-button, engage-live-geo-button, map-error-state. On web preview, useSentinelLocation immediately returns mode='unavailable' so engage-live-geo always falls through to MapErrorState — this is the intended behaviour, not a bug.
